channel.title: +kalavai on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +kalavai on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Depleted U Iraqi
item.description: Source: FB We met with an Iraqi family, who have been out friends for the last 15 years. Their daughter was a K-12 classmate of ours. The Iraqi lady narrated her experience of the genocidal war America waged against Iraq. Her brother and sister-in-law were killed in US strikes. Both were civilians. Their only child is battling cancer which he got as a result of the US using depleted uranium shells.
